name: glean
title: Glean
description: Capture web articles as Obsidian notes with AI summaries
author: kiyanwang

commands.name: glean-url
commands.title: Glean URL
commands.subtitle: Capture article to Obsidian
commands.description: Glean the current browser URL or clipboard URL as an Obsidian note

commands.name: glean-url-form
commands.title: Glean URL (Advanced)
commands.description: Glean a URL with custom options (category, tags, model)

commands.name: queue-status
commands.title: Glean Queue Status
commands.description: View the status of queued glean jobs

commands.name: clear-jobs
commands.title: Clear Glean Queue
commands.description: Clear completed and failed jobs from the queue

preferences.name: gleanPath
preferences.title: Glean Binary Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to glean binary. Leave empty to use PATH. All other settings are read from ~/.gleanrc.json.
